prompt:
Ultra-realistic luxury lifestyle portrait of the same beautiful young woman standing in an elegant outdoor café during golden hour. She is wearing a fully modest, long-sleeved emerald-green satin blouse with a high neckline and relaxed fit, paired with high-waisted wide-leg ivory trousers. The outfit is completely opaque, sophisticated, and fully covered with no revealing elements. She wears elegant gold hoop earrings, delicate bracelets, rings, and a luxury wristwatch.
She extends a crystal whiskey glass toward the camera, creating a dramatic forced-perspective composition. The glass contains a sparkling amber-colored mocktail with large crystal-clear ice cubes, fresh peach slices, mint leaves, and a spectacular splash frozen mid-air. Floating peach slices, mint leaves, sparkling droplets, and tiny golden reflections surround the glass.
Her face remains perfectly sharp behind the drink with a confident yet gentle expression. Warm cinematic golden-hour lighting, creamy bokeh, lush greenery, marble café tables, luxury outdoor ambience, shallow depth of field, editorial beverage advertising style, ultra-detailed glass reflections, HDR, photorealistic, 85mm lens, f/1.8, natural skin texture, ultra-high detail, 8K, masterpiece, premium commercial advertising quality.
promptEn:
Ultra-realistic luxury lifestyle portrait of the same beautiful young woman standing in an elegant outdoor café during golden hour. She is wearing a fully modest, long-sleeved emerald-green satin blouse with a high neckline and relaxed fit, paired with high-waisted wide-leg ivory trousers. The outfit is completely opaque, sophisticated, and fully covered with no revealing elements. She wears elegant gold hoop earrings, delicate bracelets, rings, and a luxury wristwatch.
She extends a crystal whiskey glass toward the camera, creating a dramatic forced-perspective composition. The glass contains a sparkling amber-colored mocktail with large crystal-clear ice cubes, fresh peach slices, mint leaves, and a spectacular splash frozen mid-air. Floating peach slices, mint leaves, sparkling droplets, and tiny golden reflections surround the glass.
Her face remains perfectly sharp behind the drink with a confident yet gentle expression. promptZh:
超写实奢华生活方式人像，描绘同一位美丽的年轻女性在黄金时刻站在优雅的户外咖啡馆中。她穿着一件完全端庄的 长袖祖母绿缎面衬衫，采用高领和宽松剪裁，搭配 高腰阔腿象牙白长裤。服装完全不透明、精致且覆盖严实，没有任何暴露元素。她佩戴着优雅的金色圆环耳环、精致的手链、戒指和奢华腕表。
她将一个 水晶威士忌杯 伸向镜头，营造出极具张力的强制透视构图。杯中盛着闪烁的琥珀色无酒精鸡尾酒，配有晶莹剔透的大冰块、新鲜桃片、薄荷叶，以及定格在半空中的壮观水花。漂浮的桃片、薄荷叶、闪烁的水滴和微小的金色反光环绕在杯子周围。
她的脸部在饮品后方保持完美清晰，表情自信而温柔。温暖的电影感黄金时刻光影、奶油般柔美的虚化效果、郁郁葱葱的绿植、大理石咖啡桌、奢华户外氛围、浅景深、编辑类饮品广告风格、超细节玻璃反射、HDR、照片级真实感、85mm 镜头、f/1.8、自然皮肤纹理、超高细节、8K、杰作、高端商业广告品质。
